blended.narrative: Smugglers Notch is expecting dry conditions over the next 48 hours. Looking ahead, 13 inches possible over the next 14 days.

daily_summary.narrative: Thursday: 2.1" of snow, highs of 55°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
Sunday: 4" of snow, highs of 34°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
Monday: 3.8" of snow, highs of 30°F. Expect variable conditions.
